data.description:
# S3 â€” Install gerrit-to-platform on the Gerrit host

Part of epic 1fa8 (CI as a second Gerrit gate vote via gerrit-to-platform â†’ GitHub Actions).

## Why
`gerrit-to-platform` (g2p) is the bridge that `workflow_dispatch`es the GitHub Actions CI on
`patchset-created` / `comment-added` and is the production-proven Gerritâ†’GitHub-Actions pattern.
It must run on the host (the `gerritcodereview/gerrit:3.14.1` image is Java-only, no Python).

## What
Enable the `hooks` + `replication` Gerrit **core** plugins (bundled in `gerrit.war`; no external
download/sha256 â€” unlike the non-core `events-log`/`oauth`), install g2p on the host, symlink its
hooks into the bind-mounted `$site/hooks/`, and configure it. Record g2p adoption as an ADR.

## Scope
- Enable core plugins; update `infra/gerrit/plugins/README.md`.
- Host-side g2p install (Pyâ‰¥3.11) + hook symlinks + `gerrit_to_platform.ini` + `replication.config`
  symlink + the `recheck â†’ verify` comment mapping.
- New ADR recording g2p adoption. Depends on S2 (replication) + S4 (the PAT via SSM).
- Out of scope: the workflow (S5), credential provisioning internals (S4), the gate (S1).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Enable the `hooks` + `replication` **core** plugins (from `gerrit.war` via `init
      --install-plugin` / copy â€” no download or sha256 pin) and list them in
      `infra/gerrit/plugins/README.md`.
- [ ] Install g2p on the host (Python â‰¥3.11) and symlink the `patchset-created` /
      `comment-added` / `change-merged` console-script hooks into the bind-mounted `$site/hooks/`.
- [ ] Write `gerrit_to_platform.ini` (GitHub PAT sourced via the host-side SSM materialization from
      S4 â€” no plaintext on disk) + the `replication.config` symlink + the `recheck â†’ verify` mapping.
- [ ] Coexistence proof: push a test patchset and observe BOTH the review-bot webhook `LLM-Review`
      vote AND the g2p hook `workflow_dispatch` fire on the same event.
- [ ] Write an ADR recording **g2p adoption** as the Gerritâ†’GitHub-Actions bridge (topology).
data.title: S3 â€” Install gerrit-to-platform on the Gerrit host
